title: Embed corelib via nested submodule for standalone CI

source.subject: fix: embed stdlib for standalone CI; add corelib submodule

body:
Embeds **corelib** as a nested git submodule inside `compiler` so standalone compiler CI can resolve stdlib without the superrepo checkout.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`3552572`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/3552572)
- **Subject:** fix: embed stdlib for standalone CI; add corelib submodule
- **Completed:** 2026-04-10

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-corelib-submodule`

## Relation
Primary implementation commit for deliverable **v01-corelib-submodule**.
